subcodes.first_line: O people of Bahá! Be ye as clouds, that from you may descend that which causeth the earth to flourish. Such befitteth them that have turned unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل البهاء کونوا کالسحاب لینزل منکم ما ینبت به الارض هذا ما ینبغی لمن اقبل
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude
